scripts.fix: pnpm exec vp fmt && pnpm exec vp lint --fix
scripts.fix-all: pnpm fix && pnpm -r exec vp fmt && pnpm -r exec vp lint --fix
scripts.test: vp run @clankgsters/sync#build && vp run -r test && vp run -w test-root
scripts.test-and-check-all: pnpm check-all && pnpm test && pnpm e2e-tests:run
scripts.test-and-fix-all: pnpm fix-all && pnpm check-all && pnpm test && pnpm e2e-tests:run
